chapter_title.en: Prayer of the Sick, the Unconcious, the Weak and the Infirm, the Elderly and Others

text: 1053 - وَ سَأَلَ عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَأْخُذُهُ اَلرُّعَافُ فِي اَلصَّلاَةِ وَ لاَ يَزِيدُ عَلَى أَنْ يَسْتَنْشِفَهُ أَ يَجُوزُ ذَلِكَ قَالَ «نَعَمْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1053 - Abdullah ibn Sulayman asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about a person who experiences nosebleed during prayer and is only able to stop it by sniffing. Is this permissible?
Imam (as) said: "Yes."
